subcodes.first_line: Concerning the honoured Amín and his journey unto the Land of Ṭá, and from thence with a company unto England or Tiflis [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در باره جناب امین و توجه او بارض تا و از آنجا مع جمعی بانگلیس و یا تفلیس
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @petitions to authorities, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
